title: Visual Travel
description: Modpack combines visual fun and in-game adventures, bringing together a collection of amazing mods that will change your Minecraft experience.
body:
![Describing Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e93a42c90096a14c3e31365218c6939bf0b2d1d8.png)

![Boost the fps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9fae410f85df30e6f9a370bce864ae3110dd4af.png)

Enhance your **single** and **multiplayer** experience in-game.

[![Download](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2c5c61794d49bb84f9358d48f344babc6b7d95.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/visual-travel/version/1.0.0)



![A Visual Travel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/543b8ce5efd19c417cf5bfc2059067d8ec544926.png)


![A Visual Travel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe347da818e37e0ec5a0150bf54b87b96cf6a074.png)

![A Visual Trails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0168b83eee311306ce8008a424544b1e6efcb06f.png)

![Beautiful Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71c31045529242734e7345dcb2839e95b6995898.png)
![Beautiful Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7156fe8e92e4bb632bbabff7a81669cd78cf909d.png)

![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8b0ee0ae904db08db062249103be976337d4c17.png)

**Better FPS:** This mod pack combines mods that increase in-game FPS, such as Sodium, Dynamic FPS, etc., to enhance your in-game experience.

**Visual Effects:** This modpack adds cosmetic effects to the game, including water particles, animations, Visual Trails, fire particles, and more.

[Visual Travel Modpack Twitter](https://x.com/visualtravell)

[Rynx Twitter X](https://x.com/ItxRynx)
